narrative: AI Engineer with seven years’ experience at Rephrase.ai, a product‑focused startup, based in Delhi. Strong JD‑relevant skill match—proficient in PyTorch, QLoRA, LoRA and scikit‑learn for model development, plus hands‑on work with Qdrant and BM25 for vector search and retrieval—places the profile well above the pool average. The primary ranking driver is this above‑average alignment with the search‑and‑retrieval requirements. Experience level aligns perfectly with the 5‑9 year band, and while the location is a short commute to Pune/Noida, remote work is feasible. A minor caveat is a flagged trust concern and an unknown notice period, which may affect hiring speed.
